result.title: How We Use AI on Your Wrist | Made by Google Podcast S9E2
result.description:
Whether you are carrying a week’s worth of groceries or balancing a toddler, sometimes you just do not have a spare hand to tap your watch screen. 

Rachid and Munjal Shah dive into the new one-handed gestures on Pixel Watch 3 and 4 that solve this exact problem for users on the go. They walk through the simplicity of the double pinch and the wrist turn while explaining how visual hints help you build the muscle memory to use them naturally. From snoozing alarms to dismissing notifications with a flick of the wrist, this episode covers how your watch is becoming a powerful AI companion that stays out of your way until the moment you need it most.

0:00 – Meet Munjal Shah: AI on the Pixel Watch 4
0:47 – Why Use One-Handed Wrist Gestures?
3:09 – Mastering Double Pinch & Wrist Turn
5:20 – Unexpected Challenges
11:09 – Raise to Talk: Natural Interactions with Gemini
14:04– Avoiding False Positives
15:53 – How Far We Have Come and "Living in the Future"

#PixelWatch #MadeByGoogle #TechPodcast

result.title: How to Vibe Code an App From a Drawing
result.description:
With vibe coding, you can build an app by just describing it.

In this video, we show you how to turn a vision and a hand-drawn sketch into a weather-responsive personalized outfit selector using Google AI Studio and Nano Banana.

We cover:
0:10 - Turning a vision into an app
2:15 - Integrating virtual try-on functionality using Nano Banana
2:49 - Explore the App Gallery

#BuildWithGemini #VibeCoding #Fashion #FashionApp #AIStudio 

We have a lot of educational tutorials coming, so subscribe to this channel and keep and eye out for those! In the meantime, our “Build apps in AI Studio” article is a great resource for getting started: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/aistudio-build-mode
Build your ideas with Gemini: https://aistudio.google.com/apps
More information on how to ship your site or builds here: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/aistudio-build-mode#deploy-or
